title: QA feature map dimensions + benchmark graph community detection
_fixture_purpose: Canonical PASS: correct dimensions, chromogeometry identity, benchmark metrics in range
source_grounding: Chromogeometry C/F/G identity is Wildberger chromogeometry (Wildberger, 2005). Benchmark method is Louvain community detection (Blondel & Guillaume, 2008).

benchmark_results.note: Zachary karate club — 2 ground truth communities (real 'club' attribute). Independently reproduced 2026-07-06 via networkx.algorithms.community.louvain_communities(seed=42) against the real karate_club_graph().

College football — 12 conferences ground truth, Louvain finds 10 communities. Independently reproduced 2026-07-06 via networkx.algorithms.community.louvain_communities(seed=42) against the real codex_on_QA/data/football.graphml.

witnesses.observation: Louvain community detection on the real Zachary karate club graph produces ARI=0.4905 vs the real 'club' attribute ground truth (independently reproduced 2026-07-06).
